inline_comments.message:
Looking at the previous configuration, on startup liveness probe will fail the pod after 10 + 60*3 (3 =default failureThreshold), i.e, 190 seconds if there is a problem with it coming up.
Looking at the new configuration, on startup the pod will take longer to fail 10 + 10*60 = 610 seconds.
Is this desirable or should the failureThreshold of the startup probe be a lower value

It will give us more time. 
The drawback is that we may wait longer in case of pod start failure and main program not crashing. 
But this case shouldn’t happen as we try to have program that exit with exit code different than 0 when that have a failure
